name: Drunk Fiancée Bent Over For Her Future Father-In-Law
description:
The problem with having a successful, dominant, handsome dad who looks like a sexy older version of you? Your fiancée’s into that, too.

This is her first time ever messing around on you—she couldn’t have picked a worse time or place to let someone seduce her, let alone have it be your dad, Richard.
creator: Appalling
